overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player entering a dimly lit office space through a door marked 'OFFICE' with purple neon lighting. The player explores the room, circling a person lying unconscious on a medical chair with glowing red cybernetic implants, then examines computer workstations and equipment in the back of the room. The environment features industrial metal flooring, teal and purple neon lighting, and cyberpunk aesthetics.

vertical purple fluorescent light fixture mounted on the wall
illuminated blue OFFICE sign above the doorway
dark industrial wall with warning signs and panels

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a door marked OFFICE with glowing blue and purple neon lighting. The camera moves through the doorway, transitioning from a narrow corridor into a larger interior space with industrial metal flooring and dim atmospheric lighting.

events.description: camera slows and focuses on the person lying on the medical chair ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the medical chair and examining the person lying on it

tall industrial metal storage lockers with mesh doors
metal shelving unit with various boxes and equipment
desk with computer monitors and equipment against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the office space, approaching a person lying unconscious on a medical chair. The room features industrial metal lockers on the left and a computer workstation visible in the distance. The lighting is dim with teal and cyan tones illuminating the metal diamond-plate flooring.

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the medical chair, providing close-up views of the unconscious person with red glowing cybernetic eyes and chest implants. The perspective shifts to show the surrounding office equipment, including a desk lamp and multiple computer monitors displaying data. The industrial metal flooring and teal lighting create a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: back office with server equipment and computer stations

events.description: camera moves away from the medical chair toward the computer workstation area
moving into darker back area of the office with reduced ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: moving away from the chair to examine the computer workstations and back area of the office

entered.detail: tall equipment racks with blinking lights and server hardware
metal filing cabinets against the back wall
posters and notices pinned to the industrial metal walls

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the medical chair into the back area of the office, focusing on computer workstations with multiple glowing monitors. The lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric as the camera explores server racks and equipment in the rear of the room. The environment features industrial piping, filing cabinets, and various cyberpunk-style computer equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit corridor into a dimly lit industrial office filled with cybernetic equipment. It begins by passing through a doorway marked OFFICE under glowing blue and purple lights, transitioning from the tight hallway into a larger space with metal diamond-plate flooring. As the camera moves deeper into the room, the lighting shifts to teal and cyan tones, leading the perspective toward an unconscious person resting on a medical chair. The camera then circles the figure to reveal glowing red cybernetic implants before panning across nearby desks and monitors. Finally, the movement pushes past the chair into the darker rear of the office, where the environment closes in around server racks, industrial piping, and glowing computer workstations.
